studies.title: Clinical study to prove the positive healthcare effect of the Uroletics® app in patients with prostate cancer

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the Uroletics app, as evidenced by the repeated mention of 'Uroletics® app' in the title and full text. The study investigates the app's effect on urinary incontinence and erectile function in prostate cancer patients, matching the product description.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a two-arm, randomized, controlled, and multicenter trial with a parallel group design. Patients are randomly assigned to receive either the app in addition to standard care or standard care alone, which aligns with the definition of an RCT.
